title: How will Emission Control Area changes affect fuel oil demand in the Mediterranean?
section_path: How will Emission Control Area changes affect fuel oil demand in the Mediterranean?
section_path_text: How will Emission Control Area changes affect fuel oil demand in the Mediterranean?
summary:
Main
The upcoming Mediterranean Emission Control Area will likely tighten ULSFO supplies in the region and free up VLSFO supplies for the East. By Xavier Tang
Since the start of 2015, the International Maritime Organization (IMO) has restricted vessels travelling through designated Emission Control Areas (ECA) from using fuel oil bunkers with a sulphur content of over 0.1%. The designated zones include the Baltic Sea, North Sea, North America and the US Caribbean Sea.
